typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Cfg_BypassDailyFundBreakdown as boolean (),
	Cfg_DefaultErrorLevel as integer (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_ServiceHostTcpUri as string (),
	ChannelName as string ()
}

source(output(
		Namespace as string,
		ClientLocationId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT Distinct Namespace, ClientLocationId FROM  Staging.ChannelAssetTransform WHERE (ImportRunId = ?)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> PositionsTransform
PositionsTransform derive(Namespace = Namespace) ~> PlaceHolderScriptComponent
PlaceHolderScriptComponent split(Exists == true(), disjoint: true) ~> Exists@(Yes,No)
Exists@Yes sort(asc(ImportRunId, false),asc(Name, false),asc(Grouping, false),asc(BagelNamespace, false)) ~> Distinct
Exists@No sort(asc(Namespace, false),asc(ImportRunId, false)) ~> Aggregate
Distinct window(over(ImportRunId,
		Name,
		Grouping,
		BagelNamespace),
	asc(ImportRunId, true),
	asc(Name, true),
	asc(Grouping, true),
	asc(BagelNamespace, true),
	Rank_col = rowNumber()) ~> Distinctdistinct
Aggregate window(over(Namespace,
		ImportRunId),
	asc(Namespace, true),
	asc(ImportRunId, true),
	Rank_col = rowNumber()) ~> Aggregatedistinct
Distinctdistinct filter(Rank_col == 1) ~> DistinctdistinctFilterComponent
Aggregatedistinct filter(Rank_col == 1) ~> AggregatedistinctFilterComponent
DistinctdistinctFilterComponent sink(input(
		ImportRunId as integer,
		FundGrouping as string,
		Namespace as string,
		Name as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportRunId,
		FundGrouping = Grouping,
		Namespace = BagelNamespace,
		Name)) ~> FundTransform
AggregatedistinctFilterComponent derive(ErrorLevel = 14301,
		Message = left('Namespace not found in Bagel: ' + Namespace, 255)) ~> Error14301
Error14301 sink(input(
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		RowNumber,
		ImportRunId,
		Message)) ~> Importerror14301
